title: Social Work
questions: What images spring to mind when you hear the phrase "social work'?
Is social work a key part of your country's society?
Do you do any / Would you like to do any social work?
Is social work the responsibility of the government or NGOs (non-government organizations)?
What kind of people are social workers?
What kinds of jobs can you get with a degree in social work?
Why are jobs in the area of social work so poorly paid?
Do you think people who get help from social workers are always grateful?
Which countries do you think have excellent social work systems?
Do you think there'll always be a need for social work in your country?
What is social work?
What areas of social work does your government need to spend more money on?
What dangers do you think there are in social work?
What skills do you need to be a good social worker?
Are social workers respected in your country?
Do you think having a qualification in social work means you can work in any country in the world?
Would you pay more taxes to help pay for more social workers?
How far do social workers help create a safer society?
What help from a social worker would you like?
What questions would you like to ask a social worker?
